channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Federal judge who refuses mental evaluation at age 97 fights suspension
item.description: Judge Pauline Newman, the oldest federal judge in America at age 97, is continuing to fight against a suspension from the bench by her colleagues who found her mentally not fit enough to serve.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden admin extends $10B Iran sanctions waiver 2 days after Trump election win
item.description: The Biden administration has extended a sanctions waiver that allows Iran to access $10 billion in funds from Iraq – a move Republicans say frees up Iran to fund terrorism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Secretary of State Blinken is returning to the Mideast in his latest diplomatic foray
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Secretary of State Antony Blinken is returning to the Middle East this week on his 12th visit since the Israel-Hamas war erupted last year but his first since the ouster of Syrian President Bashar Assad that has sparked new fears of instability in the region now wracked by three co
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Outgoing Rep. Jamaal Bowman issues 'Dear White People' thread following Daniel Penny acquittal
item.description: Rep. Jamaal Bowman issues "Dear White People" message following Daniel Penny acquittal. Bowman, who lost a Democratic primary earlier this year, will soon leave Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top DOGE senator demands answers on plan to exhaust CHIPs Act funds before Trump arrives
item.description: Senate DOGE Caucus leader Joni Ernst of Iowa is sending letter to Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo about her recent comments outlining how CHIPs Act funds will be spent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: State agency to ask lawmakers for $300 million to fix “significant neglect” in Texas’ Medicaid enrollment system
item.description: The request, which includes hiring more staff and updating the online application system, comes as applicants must wait for months to receive approval for benefits.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Terri Langford, KPRC 2

item.title: Biden approves national security memo on China, Iran, North Korea and Russia ahead of Trump's return
item.description: President Joe Biden has approved a new national security memorandum that could serve as a road map for the incoming Trump administration as it looks to counter growing cooperation among China, Iran, North Korea and Russia.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mike Huckabee 'commends' Biden support for Israel's self-defense
item.description: Israel said Tuesday it had bombed more than 350 military sites in Syria during the previous 48 hours.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Making a $1B investment in the US? Trump pledges expedited permits — but there are hurdles
item.description: Much like other Trump plans, the idea is likely to run into regulatory and legislative hurdles, including a landmark law that requires federal agencies to consider the environmental impact before deciding on major projects.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: GOP Armed Services chair criticizes ban on gender-affirming care for minors in NDAA
item.description: House Armed Services Committee Chair Mike Rogers (R-Ala.) on Tuesday lamented the inclusion of a provision banning coverage of gender-affirming care for minors in the annual defense authorization bill, saying that Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) did not consult him about it.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report on attempts to kill Trump urges Secret Service to limit protection of foreign leaders
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A congressional task force investigating the attempts to kill Donald Trump during his presidential campaign is recommending changes to the Secret Service, including protecting fewer foreign leaders during the height of election season and considering moving the agency out of the Ho
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden says he was 'stupid' not to put his name on pandemic relief checks like Trump did
item.description: President Joe Biden says he was “stupid” not to put his own name on pandemic relief checks in 2021, like Donald Trump had done in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump's incoming border czar reveals he's already making plans for 1,400 acres of land offered by Texas
item.description: Incoming border czar Tom Homan says he is already making plans on what to do with a chunk of land offered to the incoming administration by Texas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Six human smugglers arrested in connection to 2021 crash that killed dozens
item.description: Authorities have arrested six Guatemalan human smugglers linked to a 2021 semi-truck crash that killed over 50 migrants and injured over 100, the Department of Justice announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House task force cites 'various failures' ahead of 'preventable' Trump shooting
item.description: The House select committee that investigated the two assassination attempts against President-elect Trump released a report on Tuesday that found the July 13 attack at Trump’s rally in Butler, Pa., was “preventable and should not have happened.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: David Valadao elected chair of Republican Governance Group
item.description: Rep. David Valadao (R-Calif.) was elected chair of the Republican Governance Group, a House GOP caucus that trends to the center ideologically, after current chair, Rep. Dave Joyce (R-Ohio), opted to step down to foster new leadership in the group.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DA suggests judge could permanently halt Trump’s hush money case while upholding his conviction
item.description: Prosecutors are urging a judge not to throw out President-elect Donald Trump’s hush money criminal conviction but suggesting a willingness to end the case in a way that would preserve the verdict while avoiding a protracted legal fight.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Minneapolis City Council’s budget committee reduces proposed property tax levy for 2025
item.description: Council members, citing concerns about elevated costs for constituents, approved a series of amendments to the mayor’s proposed budget which would reduce the levy hike by 1.4 percent.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez seeks to lead Democrats on Oversight panel
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) on Friday formally launched a bid to lead Democrats on the Oversight and Accountability Committee in the next Congress — a powerful seat that will play a prominent role in the party's effort to push back against President Trump in his second term.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, Fox 5

item.title: A court upholds the U.S. ban on TikTok
item.description: The appeals court agreed that the viral video app must be sold off by its China-based parent company, rejecting TikTok's claim that the crackdown violates the free speech rights of millions of Americans.
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn, MPR News

item.title: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy are bringing Trump’s DOGE to Capitol Hill
item.description: The leaders of the so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” are calling for large-scale layoffs of federal workers and the elimination of some federal agencies during Trump's second term.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Steven Horsford to hand off role as chair of Congressional Black Caucus
item.description: Nevada Congressman Steven Horsford will no longer be the chair of the Congressional Black Caucus for the 119th Congress.
item.dc:creator: Linsey Lewis, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump criticizes Chronister after sheriff's withdrawal, days after praising him
item.description: President Donald Trump challenged reports of Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister's DEA withdrawal, saying he didn't want the sheriff days his cabinet days after nominating him.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC
